name: community-fs-dark-botanical
title: Dark Botanical
description: Elegant premium dark slides: near-black centered serif composition with blurred warm pink/gold/terracotta glow orbs, thin vertical accent lines, and italic signature typography. Cormorant + IBM Plex Sans on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport, zero dependencies. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides STYLE_PRESETS.md preset 4 (Dark Botanical).

description_i18n.en: Elegant premium dark slides: near-black centered serif composition with blurred warm pink/gold/terracotta glow orbs, thin vertical accent lines, and italic signature typography. Cormorant + IBM Plex Sans on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport, zero dependencies. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides STYLE_PRESETS.md preset 4 (Dark Botanical).
description_i18n.zh-CN: 高级感暗调幻灯片「暗夜植物园」：近黑底居中衬线排版，暖粉/金/赤陶模糊渐变圆光晕、细竖向 accent 线与斜体签名字，Cormorant + IBM Plex Sans，固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放适配任意屏幕，零依赖单文件。基于 zarazhangrui/frontend-slides STYLE_PRESETS.md 第 4 节 Dark Botanical。

query.en: Create an elegant Dark Botanical {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, designed as a {{density}} deck. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies (all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no chart libraries). The visual system is LOCKED to the Dark Botanical theme - premium near-black elegance with warm low-saturation glow: (1) Tokens, verbatim: --stage-bg:#0a0a0a; --bg-primary:#0f0f0f; --text-primary:#e8e4df; --text-secondary:#9a9590; --text-faint:rgba(232,228,223,0.34); --accent-warm:#d4a574 (terracotta gold, primary accent); --accent-pink:#e8b4b8 (dusty rose, italic emphasis); --accent-gold:#c9b896 (pale gold, signatures); --line:rgba(232,228,223,0.14); --line-warm:rgba(212,165,116,0.45). No other colors - no purple, no blue, no indigo #6366f1, no neon, no saturated hues. (2) Typography: Cormorant (400/500/600 + true italics) as display serif, titles at weight 500 with an italic dusty-rose <em> word; IBM Plex Sans 300/400 body (default weight 300); kickers 19px uppercase letter-spacing 0.42em in --accent-warm; one Cormorant-italic 32px signature line in --accent-gold on cover/divider/closing slides. Never Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system fonts. (3) Signature devices, all required: blurred glow orbs (border-radius:50%, filter:blur(90px), radial-gradient accent fills at 0.40-0.55 alpha fading to transparent, 380-700px, anchored off-canvas in corners, 1-3 per slide, warm+pink overlapping); thin 1px vertical accent lines (80-110px, gradient to transparent) above titles and atop columns; outlined giant Cormorant numerals (-webkit-text-stroke 1.5px --accent-warm, transparent fill) on section dividers; small blur(7px) orb dots as card bullets. Abstract CSS shapes only - no illustrations, no photos, no external images. (4) Layout: centered composition (.slide-inner is a centered flex column, text-align:center, 110px padding); shell chrome on every slide - roman-numeral slide number top-left in Cormorant --accent-warm, small-caps breadcrumbs top-right, 1px baseline rule bottom with two small-caps labels. Compose from the seeded master pages: cover, serif-numbered contents, outlined-numeral section divider, 3-column pillars with per-accent vlines, oversized big-number stat, slender rounded gradient-column CSS chart with scaleY entrance, 70px italic quote, two-column comparison split by a vertical gradient line, 2x2 hairline collection grid with orb dots, closing with signature and inline-SVG contact links. (5) Stage system, locked: author on a fixed 1920x1080 canvas inside .deck-viewport > .deck-stage; JS scales the whole stage uniformly (factor = min(innerWidth/1920, innerHeight/1080), translate+scale, centered letterbox, re-run on resize); never reflow per device, no responsive breakpoints inside slides. Each page is one <section class="slide">; switch only via .active/.visible toggling visibility/opacity/pointer-events - never display:none. Keyboard (arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End), debounced wheel, touch swipe, #/<index> hash routing with deep-link restore; page counter fixed outside the scaled stage; include the full viewport-base.css block with print styles and prefers-reduced-motion. (6) Motion: .reveal children translate up 30px + fade when the slide gains .visible, staggered ~0.12s; one signature easing cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) at 0.9s - languid and soft, never bouncy; animate only transform and opacity. (7) Content: 8-11 slides, no scrolling, no overflow at 1920x1080; split content into more slides instead of shrinking type; max 3 pillars / 4 cards / 4 chart columns; icons are inline SVG at 1.6px stroke in --accent-warm. Start from the example.html seed in this plugin: keep its stage CSS, :root tokens, slide shell chrome, and the entire SlidePresentation controller script verbatim - replace only the slide content. Do not redesign, do not introduce colors or fonts outside this spec.
query.zh-CN: 用「暗夜植物园 Dark Botanical」主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：零依赖单文件 HTML，近黑底（#0f0f0f）居中排版，Cormorant 衬线标题（斜体玫瑰色强调词）+ IBM Plex Sans 轻量正文，暖粉/金/赤陶（#d4a574/#e8b4b8/#c9b896）模糊渐变圆光晕、细竖向 accent 线、描边大号衬线数字与斜体签名字——纯 CSS 抽象形，禁止插画与规格外颜色。固定 1920x1080 舞台整体等比缩放适配视口，section.slide + .active/.visible 切换，键盘/滚轮/触摸导航 + hash 路由，.reveal 错峰柔和入场（cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)）。从插件内 example.html 种子出发，保留舞台系统、token 与导航脚本，只替换内容。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。
